metodos.codigoOriginal:
Lparameters llPagRec

lcLabel = Iif(ThisForm.ck_Pagamentos.Value == 1,[Pagamento:],[Recebimento:]) 

ThisForm.get_Numes.Enabled = llPagRec
ThisForm.Opt_AnaSi.Enabled = not(llPagRec)
ThisForm.lblPeriodo.Caption = Iif(llPagRec,lcLabel,[Vencimento:])
ThisForm.Opt_Juros.Enabled = not(llPagRec)
Thisform.get_Juros.Enabled = not(llPagRec)

Return

Lparameters ldDataVenc, nVlrBase

Local lnVlrJuros, lnDias, lnJurosDia

lnVlrJuros = 0
lnJurosDia = Round((((1+ThisForm.Get_Juros.Value/100) ^ (1/30)) - 1) * 100, 9)

If( ldDataVenc < Date() ) and (ThisForm.Opt_Juros.Value == 1) 
	lnDias = Date() - ldDataVenc	
	lnVlrJuros = Round(nVlrBase * (((1+lnJurosDia / 100) ^ (lnDias))-1), 2)	
Endif
Return(lnVlrJuros)

Private pDataIni, pDataFin
Local lcDopes, ldDataIni, ldDataFin, lcGrupo, lcConta

lcDopes = Padr(Iif(ThisForm.ck_Pagamentos.Value = 1,[PAGAMENTO],[RECEBIMENTO]),20 )

ldDataIni = ThisForm.getDtInicial.Value
ldDataFin = ThisForm.getDtFinal.Value
lcGrupo   = ThisForm.get_Grupo.Value
lcConta   = ThisForm.get_Conta.Value
lnCodOper = ThisForm.get_Numes.Value 

pDataIni = fDtoSQL(ldDataIni)  
pDataFin = fDtoSQL(ldDataFin,[23:59:59])

Create Cursor crDados(Vencs d(8), Emps c(3), Numes n(6), Datas d(8),... [TRUNCADO]

Local llPagRec
llPagRec  = (ThisForm.ck_Pagamentos.Value = 1) or (ThisForm.ck_Recebimentos.Value = 1)

If (ThisForm.Opt_AnaSi.Value = 3)
	Report Form SigReAp4 Preview NoConsole
Else
	If not llPagRec
		If( ThisForm.opt_AnaSi.Value == 1 )
			Report Form SigReAp1 Preview NoConsole
		Else
			Report Form SigReAp2 Preview NoConsole
		Endif	
	Else
		Report Form SigReAp3 Preview NoConsole
	EndIf
EndIf

Private pdDataIni, pdDataFin
Local lnJuros, lcGrupo, lcConta, ldDataIni, ldDataFin, lcTitulo, lcSubTit, lcPeriodo, lcEmpresa, lnQtdEmp, llPagRec, lcJob, lcDesJob

ldDataIni = ThisForm.getDtInicial.Value
ldDataFin = ThisForm.getDtFinal.Value
lnDatas   = ThisForm.optDatas.Value 
lcCpoDt   = Iif(lnDatas = 1, [Vencs], Iif(lnDatas = 2, [DtEmis], [Datas]))
lnJuros   = ThisForm.get_Juros.Value
lcGrupo   = ThisForm.get_Grupo.Value
lcConta   = ThisForm.get_Conta.Value
llPagRec  = (ThisForm.ck_Pagamentos.... [TRUNCADO]

ThisForm.getDtInicial.Value = Date()
ThisForm.getDtFinal.Value = Date()
ThisForm.get_Numes.Value = 0 

ThisForm.lnVlCotacao = 1

WITH Thisform
	.poDatamgr = CreateObject('fSqlConector',Thisform.Name)

	If Not .poDatamgr.pnIdconn>0
		Messagebox('Impossivel Efetuar Conexăo com Servidor de Banco de Dados.',(0+48),goSistema.TituloSistema)
		Return(.f.)
	Endif

	ThisForm.poDataMgr.CursorQuery('SigCdMoe', 'crSigCdMoe', .f., .f., 'CMoes, Cotas')
	Select crSigCdMoe
	Index On CMoes Tag CMoes
	
	ThisForm.... [TRUNCADO]

Local llPagRec
llPagRec  = (ThisForm.ck_Pagamentos.Value = 1) or (ThisForm.ck_Recebimentos.Value = 1)

If (ThisForm.Opt_AnaSi.Value = 3)
	Report Form SigReAp4 to PRINTER Prompt NoConsole
Else
	If not llPagRec
		If( ThisForm.opt_AnaSi.Value == 1 )
			Report Form SigReAp1 to Print Prompt NoConsole
		Else
			Report Form SigReAp2 to Print Prompt NoConsole
		Endif	
	Else
		Report Form SigReAp3 to PRINTER Prompt NoConsole
	EndIf
EndIf

If ThisForm.Opt_AnaSi.Value = 3
	Select crDados
	Go Top in crDados
	
	Select grpsaldos,vencs,titulos,hists,especienfs,valors,opers,debitos,creditos,saldodia,saldotot,moedas From crProcessar ;
	Where 0=0 Into Cursor crDados3 ReadWrite 

	Select crDados3
	Go Top in crDados3
EndIf 
=DoDefault()

Local llPagRec
llPagRec  = (ThisForm.ck_Pagamentos.Value = 1) or (ThisForm.ck_Recebimentos.Value = 1)

If (ThisForm.Opt_AnaSi.Value = 3)
	Report Form SigReAp4 to PRINTER NoConsole
Else
	If not llPagRec
		If( ThisForm.opt_AnaSi.Value == 1 ) 
			Report Form SigReAp1 to Print NoConsole
		Else
			Report Form SigReAp2 to Print NoConsole
		Endif	
	Else
		Report Form SigReAp3 to PRINTER NoConsole
	EndIf
EndIf
Return Empty(ThisForm.get_cd_moeda.Value)

Local loLista

If Not Empty(This.Value)
	loLista = CreateObject('fwbuscaext', ThisForm.poDataMgr.pnIdConn, 'SigCdMoe', ;
						   'crListaRemota', 'DMoes', This.Value, 'Seleçăo', .t.)

	If Not loLista.plAchouRegistro
		loLista.mAddColuna('DMoes', '', 'Descriçăo')
		loLista.mAddColuna('CMoes', '', 'Código')
		loLista.Show()
	EndIf
	
	This.Parent.get_Cd_Moeda.Value = crListaRemota.Cmoes
	This.Parent.get_Ds_Moeda.Value = crListaRemota.Dmoes
	Use In crListaRemota
Else
	This.Parent.get_Cd_Moeda.Value... [TRUNCADO]

lnVlCotacao = 0
lnVlCotacao = fBuscarCambio({}, Date(), Space(03), ThisForm.get_cd_moeda.Value)
ThisForm.lnVlCotacao = Iif(lnVlCotacao=0, 1, lnVlCotacao)
* Fim **************************************************************************************

Local loLista

If Not Empty(This.Value)
	loLista = CreateObject('fwbuscaext', ThisForm.poDataMgr.pnIdConn, 'SigCdMoe', ;
						   'crListaRemota', 'CMoes', This.Value, 'Seleçăo', .t.)

	If Not loLista.plAchouRegistro
		loLista.mAddColuna('CMoes', '', 'Código')
		loLista.mAddColuna('DMoes', '', 'Descriçăo')
		loLista.Show()
	EndIf
	
	This.Parent.get_Cd_Moeda.Value = crListaRemota.Cmoes
	This.Parent.get_Ds_Moeda.Value = crListaRemota.Dmoes
	Use In crListaRemota
Else
	This.Parent.get_Cd_Moeda.Value... [TRUNCADO]

lnVlCotacao = 0
lnVlCotacao = fBuscarCambio({}, Date(), Space(03), ThisForm.get_cd_moeda.Value)
ThisForm.lnVlCotacao = Iif(lnVlCotacao=0, 1, lnVlCotacao)
* Fim **************************************************************************************

LParameters nButton, nShift, nXCoord, nYCoord

Local Imps

m.Imps = Iif( crSigCdClc.Imps = 0, 1, 0 )

Select crSigCdClc
Gather Memvar Fields Imps
ThisForm.grdCla.Refresh() 

NoDefault
* Fim **************************************************************************************

LParameters nKeyCode, nShiftAltCtrl

Local Imps

If InList(nKeyCode, 13, 32)
	m.Imps = Iif( crSigCdClc.Imps = 1, 0, 1 )

	Select crSigCdClc
	Gather Memvar Fields Imps
	ThisForm.GrdCla.Refresh()  

	NoDefault
EndIf
* Fim **************************************************************************************
NoDefault
Return .f.

LParameters nButton, nShift, nXCoord, nYCoord

Local Imps

m.Imps = Iif( crSigCdEmp.Imps = 0, 1, 0 )

Select crSigCdEmp
Gather Memvar Fields Imps
ThisForm.grdEmps.Refresh

NoDefault
* Fim **************************************************************************************

LParameters nKeyCode, nShiftAltCtrl

Local Imps

If InList(nKeyCode, 13, 32)
	m.Imps = Iif( crSigCdEmp.Imps = 1, 0, 1 )

	Select crSigCdEmp
	Gather Memvar Fields Imps
	ThisForm.grdEmps.Refresh

	NoDefault
EndIf
* Fim **************************************************************************************
NoDefault
Return .f.
Return .f.

if( ThisForm.ck_MarcaEmp.Value = 1 ) Then
	Replace all Imps with 1 in crSigCdEmp
Else
	Replace all Imps with 0 in crSigCdEmp
Endif
Return(Empty(ThisForm.Get_Conta.Value))

Grupo = ThisForm.Get_Grupo.Value
If !Empty(This.Value)
	If !fAcessoContas(Usuar,grupo,'D',This.Value,This.Parent.Get_Conta,This)
		MessageBox('Acesso Negado !!',48,'')
		This.Value = ''
		This.Refresh
		ThisForm.Get_Conta.Value = ''
		ThisForm.Get_Conta.Refresh() 
		Return 0
	EndIf
Else
	ThisForm.Get_Conta.Value = ''	
	ThisForm.Get_Conta.Refresh() 
	Return(.T.)
EndIf

Grupo = ThisForm.Get_Grupo.Value
If !Empty(This.Value)
	If !fAcessoContas(Usuar,Grupo,'C',This.Value,This,This.Parent.Get_Dconta)
		MessageBox('Acesso Negado !!',48,'')
		This.Value = ''
		This.Refresh
		ThisForm.Get_DConta.Value = ''
		ThisForm.Get_DConta.Refresh() 
		Return 0
	EndIf
Else
	ThisForm.Get_DConta.Value = ''
	ThisForm.Get_DConta.Refresh() 
	Return(.T.)
EndIf
Return(Empty(ThisForm.Get_Grupo.Value))

If !Empty(This.Value)
	fAcessoContab(Usuar,'D',This.Value,This.Parent.Get_Grupo,This)
Else
	ThisForm.Get_Grupo.Value = ''
	ThisForm.Get_Grupo.Refresh() 
EndIf
Return(.T.)

If !Empty(This.Value)
	fAcessoContab(Usuar,'C',This.Value,This,This.Parent.Get_DGrupo)
Else
	ThisForm.Get_DGrupo.Value = [] 
	ThisForm.Get_DGrupo.Refresh() 
EndIf
Return(.T.)

If( This.Value == 2 )
	ThisForm.get_Juros.Value = 0
Endif
Return(ThisForm.Opt_Juros.Value == 1)

if( ThisForm.ck_MarcaOpe.Value = 1 ) Then
	Replace all Imps with 1 in crSigOpOpe
Else
	Replace all Imps with 0 in crSigOpOpe
Endif

ThisForm.ck_Recebimentos.Value = Iif(This.Value = 1, 0, ThisForm.ck_Recebimentos.Value )
ThisForm.HabObjs((ThisForm.ck_Pagamentos.Value = 1) or (ThisForm.ck_Recebimentos.Value = 1))

ThisForm.ck_Pagamentos.Value = Iif(This.Value = 1, 0, ThisForm.ck_Pagamentos.Value )
ThisForm.HabObjs((ThisForm.ck_Pagamentos.Value = 1) or (ThisForm.ck_Recebimentos.Value = 1))

If !Empty(This.Value ) And this.peantvalue <> this.Value
	If !fAcessoContas( Usuar, '', 'C', This.Value,this,ThisForm.Get_dJobs, .f., .f. ,.f.,.f.,.f.,.f.,.f.,10)
		MessageBox( 'Acesso Negado...', 48, '' )
		Thisform.get_Jobs.Value =""
		ThisForm.Get_dJobs.Value = ''
		Return .f.
	EndIf
Else
	Thisform.Get_dJobs.Value = ''
Endif

if( ThisForm.ck_MarcaCla.Value = 1 ) Then
	Replace all Imps with 1 in crSigCdClc
Else
	Replace all Imps with 0 in crSigCdClc
Endif
Return( Empty(thisform.get_dJobs.Value) )

If !Empty( This.Value ) And this.peantvalue <> this.Value
	If !fAcessoContas( Usuar, '', 'D', This.Value, Thisform.Get_Jobs, This, .f., .f. ,.f.,.f.,.f.,.f.,.f.,10)	
		MessageBox( 'Acesso Negado...', 48, '' )
	    Thisform.get_Jobs.Value = ''
		This.Value = ''
		Return .f.
	Endif
Else
    Thisform.get_Jobs.Value = ''
Endif

sqlQueries.queryOriginal: Select grpsaldos,vencs,titulos,hists,especienfs,valors,opers,debitos,creditos,saldodia,saldotot,moedas From crProcessar ; 	Where 0=0 Into Cursor crDados3 ReadWrite
